description: Idea-to-shipped development pipeline as Claude Code subagents + skills: researcher, analyst (shapes stories + records cards), lead (orchestrates a story across units — writes + validates specs, dispatches coders directly, runs the simplify pass), coder (builds one unit through its own qa/review/fix loop; also runs the story simplify pass), qa, writer, reviewer (native code review), auditor (native readiness audits + story acceptance), and the gemini dispatcher (agy library work).
